description: n8n is a workflow automation platform with 500+ integrations, code-level control, and self-hosting for technical teams.
overview: n8n is a low-code automation platform that connects apps and builds multi-step AI workflows, with 500+ integrations and self-hosting for full data control.
what_is: n8n is a flexible workflow automation platform for technical teams. It combines drag-and-drop building with full coding control, so users can build custom, multi-step AI workflows quickly, and it can be self-hosted for data control with over 500 app integrations.

It is used to automate IT, security, development, and sales tasks, from employee onboarding to enriching tickets and generating customer insights. Ready-made templates and quick API connections mean teams often see results within hours.
n8n connects to CRM, communication, data storage, and AI systems. It is aimed at technical users building flexible automations rather than non-technical users who need simple one-step, no-code tools.
